steps.title: Identify what evidence supports the claim
steps.content: The student's claim is that Tobar blends his expertise by applying journalism techniques to fiction creation. The strongest signal: the quotation must show Tobar actively using journalism methods (reporting, interviewing, research) when writing a fictional work.

steps.title: Match the evidence to the claim
steps.content: Choice A shows Tobar using journalist methods (interviewing, researching like a reporter) to create a novel, directly applying journalism to fiction. The other choices either chronicle his separate careers, reverse the technique direction (fiction in nonfiction), or describe a character rather than his actual process. That matches choice A — A is correct.
